## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature or endpoint
- [ ] API or request/response shape change

## API contract (if you changed routes or request/response shapes)

- [ ] I updated the [OpenAPI spec](https://github.com/HelloblueAI/Bleu.js/blob/main/docs/api/openapi.yaml) in the main repo (or opened a PR there).
- [ ] I added an entry to this repo’s [CHANGELOG.md](CHANGELOG.md) describing the API change.

If your change affects the API, see the [Changing the API runbook](https://github.com/HelloblueAI/Bleu.js/blob/main/docs/CHANGING_THE_API.md) in the main repo.

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes (typecheck + smoke + contract)
